compiled_state.title: RED: Write failing tests for _check_rate_limit_error() rate-limit detection
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Write failing behavioral tests for the error-reactive rate-limit detection function that will be added to agent-batch-lifecycle.sh.

### Files to create
- tests/scripts/test-lifecycle-error-reactive.sh

### Test cases (behavioral — call function, assert sentinel/output)
- test_rate_limit_detected: input containing "rate.limit" → sentinel file created, returns match
- test_usage_limit_detected: input containing "usage.limit" → sentinel file created
- test_quota_exceeded_detected: input containing "quota.exceeded" → sentinel file created
- test_transient_429_not_matched: input containing "HTTP 429" without quota keywords → no sentinel, no match
- test_no_match: clean input → no sentinel, no match
- test_sentinel_overrides_pre_check: sentinel exists → cmd_pre_check emits MAX_AGENTS: 1
- test_sentinel_ttl_expired: sentinel older than 5 minutes → ignored by cmd_pre_check

### TDD requirement
All tests MUST fail because _check_rate_limit_error() does not exist yet.

### Test approach
Each test pipes mock sub-agent result text to the function and asserts on sentinel file existence and function return code.

## File Impact
- tests/scripts/test-lifecycle-error-reactive.sh (create)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-lifecycle-error-reactive.sh
- [ ] Contains at least 6 test cases
  Verify: grep -c "_test_\|test_" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-lifecycle-error-reactive.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 6)}'
- [ ] Tests fail (RED)
  Verify: ! bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-lifecycle-error-reactive.sh 2>/dev/null
- [ ] All other existing tests still pass
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
